task_completion.description: Verify the code_snippets directory was created in the correct Talon user path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or code editor tree showing a folder named 'code_snippets' inside 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user'.

task_completion.description: Verify snippets.talon-list is created with the required user.code_snippet list and voice mappings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'snippets.talon-list' open in an editor, containing 'list: user.code_snippet' and mappings like 'python class: python_class', 'html table: html_table', etc., matching the 9 required items.

task_completion.description: Verify snippets.py registers the list and defines a dictionary mapping identifiers to valid code templates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'snippets.py' open in an editor, showing Talon Module/Context setup, list registration for 'code_snippet', and a dictionary mapping keys like 'python_class' to actual, syntactically valid code strings (e.g., 'class MyClass:\n    pass') with no placeholders.

task_completion.description: Verify snippets.py implements the user.insert_snippet action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In 'snippets.py', an @mod.action_class block containing a 'def insert_snippet(name: str):' function that looks up the snippet in the dictionary and inserts it.

task_completion.description: Verify snippets.talon implements the voice commands to insert and list snippets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'snippets.talon' open in an editor, containing the command 'snippet {user.code_snippet}:' which calls 'user.insert_snippet(...)', and a 'snippet list:' command which prints or logs the available snippets.

integrity.description: Check that the code templates in snippets.py are realistic and syntactically valid, not just empty strings or literal placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence:
The dictionary values in snippets.py should look like real Python, JS, or HTML code (e.g., 'def my_func():\n pass', '...
').

integrity.description: Check that the files are actually saved in the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The editor's file path or title bar should indicate the files are saved in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\code_snippets\.

integrity.description: Ensure the code does not have obvious syntax errors that would prevent Talon from loading it.
integrity.visual_evidence: No red squiggly error lines under the Python or Talon code in the editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target directory: C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\code_snippets\. Required mappings for snippets.talon-list: 'python class' -> 'python_class', 'python function' -> 'python_function', 'python try except' -> 'python_try_except', 'javascript function' -> 'javascript_function', 'javascript arrow' -> 'javascript_arrow', 'javascript promise' -> 'javascript_promise', 'html table' -> 'html_table', 'html form' -> 'html_form', 'html boilerplate' -> 'html_boilerplate'.
